title: rhododendron scabrifolium
intro: Rhododendron scabrifolium, also known as the rough-leaved rhododendron, is a species of flowering plant in the heath family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The leaves and flowers of Rhododendron scabrifolium are used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, offering health benefits like reduced inflammation and improved immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
